title: Gruv Square
body:
Do you hate how dark the dark mode Gui texture packs are on Modrinth? Well this is for you.

Gruv Square is a texture pack Themed around the GruvBox color Pallet,
It offers a simplistic look yet easy for the eyes experience and is usable in any
situation.

All Credits go to the people that made the pallet here: https://github.com/morhetz/gruvbox
